import pytest
from source import sqrt


def test_sqrt_residual_convergence():
    result = sqrt(2, 0.01)
    expected_sqrt2 = 1.4142135623730951
    assert abs(result - expected_sqrt2) <= 0.01, \
        f"sqrt(2, 0.01) should be approximately {expected_sqrt2:.2f}, got {result}"
